• Time Interval or On-Screen Wake wallpaper changes
• Scheduled wallpapers (Noon / Day)
• Redesigned Gallery & Settings
• Share images to other apps
• In-app Home Screen widget controls
• GitHub sideload updater
• Theme colors

• Improved layout replacing the old full-screen design

[color=#4CAF50][b]Fixes[/b][/color]
• DPI shape inconsistencies fixed
